title: iCommon API
description: Common API for multi-version functions & events.
body: # iCommonLib iCommonLib is my library of common functions made to be independent of the game version. ## Features: - Simple YAML Configuration API - Events to simplify targeting multiple versions. - Resource/Datapack Metadata API - World API - & More ### Events - BlockEntityLoadEvent - EntityPortalCollideEvent - CampfireBlockEntityCookEvent - PlayerGamemodeChangeEvent - PlayerExpOrbCollisionEvent - ServerPlayerInitEvent - ServerWorldInitEvent - WorldChunkInitEvent - & More ## Download See the "Versions" Tab for Downloads. ## Affiliate
